valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Tue 30 Jun 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Wed 01 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: Low northern Ireland 1015 losing its identity. Developing low moving rather quickly northeast, expected west of Rockall 1004 by midday tomorrow
